mechanism: Excluding SBC from non-GAAP earnings understates the true WACC sensitivity of equity values by ~25-35%, meaning the already-compressed ROIC-WACC spread is even more dangerous than headline metrics suggest when measured on a true economic cost basis including SBC duration.
regime_dependence: Concentrated in tech sector where SBC is highest (~$180-200B annual S&P 500 aggregate). Impact scales with SBC/revenue ratios and market multiple levels.
